title: agrestis schleicheri
intro: Agrestis schleicheri, also known as Wild Chamomile or Pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Agrestis schleicheri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in essential oil form, making it a versatile natural remedy.
